## Use Case

## Proposed Behavior

What should change?

## Safety Boundaries

This project does not accept requests for:

- automatic trading;
- buy, sell, short, withdrawal, or order execution logic;
- wallet management;
- crypto private keys or seed phrases;
- direct financial advice.

## Additional Context

Add any relevant mock data, screenshots, or documentation links.
